message:
feat(demo): add mouse + keyboard shortcuts to Snapshot Player, Theme Studio, Widget Builder

Add mouse click/scroll/right-click interactions and keybinding hints to
three demo screens (bd-iuvb.17.10.7, bd-iuvb.17.10.6, bd-iuvb.17.9.7):

Snapshot Player: click timeline to jump, click preview to toggle playback,
right-click for marker/heatmap, scroll to step frames.

Theme Studio: click preset/inspector to select, scroll to navigate lists,
right-click to apply preset.

Widget Builder: click presets to load, click widget tree to select,
right-click to save preset/toggle border, scroll to navigate.

Each screen stores StdCell<Rect> layout areas for mouse hit-testing,
adds handle_mouse() method, and includes 5 mouse interaction tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
